package rulefixtures

import (
	gorm "gorm.io/gorm"
)

// scenario for offset_pagination_on_large_table: Request-path GORM Find(...) chains that page with Offset(...), which often scales poorly on large lists.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: data_access; severity: contextual.
type Rule276NegativeRecord struct { ID int }

func scenario276Negative(db *gorm.DB, ids []int) error {
	if len(ids) == 0 {
		return nil
	}
	return db.Where("id IN ?", ids).Limit(len(ids)).Find(&[]Rule276NegativeRecord{}).Error
}
